content.claim: Primary school sites in Hungary declined from 3,609 in 2021 to 3,521 by 2024; nationally 8,590 school sites exist as of 2024 compared to 9,046 in 2021.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Portuguese system reform lens
limitations: Does not distinguish between closures driven by enrollment decline versus administrative consolidation
Scope ambiguity: figures include all institution types when reporting settlements without public educational institutions
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
